mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORDERS (user_id, recipe_book_id, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recipeBookId}, 'PENDING')
mapper.update: UPDATE ORDERS SET external_order_id = #{externalOrderId}, status = 'CONFIRMED' WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT order_id, user_id, recipe_book_id, external_order_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM ORDERS WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
